build_system: None - no build step required. Open index.html directly or serve via GitHub Pages.
test_framework: None - manual browser testing. Validation via opening index.html.
verification_instructions: Open index.html in a browser and verify: (1) Dashboard loads with today's date and countdown, (2) Can mark questions as completed, (3) Spaced repetition schedules appear on future days, (4) localStorage persists data across refresh, (5) 3-hour constraint is respected in daily view.
setup_instructions: No setup required. All files are static HTML/CSS/JS.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode - no external CDNs, no npm packages, no external fonts or icons. Everything must be self-contained in vanilla HTML/CSS/JS. No build tools available.
key_patterns: Single index.html with embedded or linked CSS/JS. localStorage for all persistence. No frameworks. Dark mode UI. Mobile-responsive.
directory_structure: Flat structure: index.html (entry point), style.css (styles), app.js (application logic), data.js (Neetcode 150 question bank)
